description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), was completing a mission traveling southwest on Division Street in San Francisco. As the vehicle was 
completing its mission and slowed to a near stop, the Zoox vehicle operator identified an oncoming bicycle, disengaged from autonomy, and
 braked the Zoox vehicle to a full stop in its lane. The bicyclist crossed into the oncoming traffic lane occupied by the Zoox vehicle and 
continued rapidly while steering directly towards the front of the Zoox vehicle. The bicycle made contact with the front bumper of the 
stationary Zoox vehicle and the bicyclist made contact with the hood of the Zoox vehicle and fell to the ground. The police and emergency 
responders arrived at the scene and the bicyclist was transported to a hospital. Preliminary police information describes injuries to the 
bicyclist as “loss of consciousness, complaint of pain to back, knee, and toe nail”. 
Print
Clear Form
